metadata.sampling: Every 7th image (312 sampled), 35+ images visually inspected

activity_distribution.note: Activity dropped 84% in H2. July=0 images. Sep=9 images. Peak activity was March (497).

BTC.note: Primary asset. BTCUSD on Coinbase + BTCUSDT on Binance perps

USDJPY.note: Active in Jan-Mar 2023 during BOJ policy shifts

daily.note: PRIMARY. Most trend analysis done here

8H.note: DISTINCTIVE. Used heavily for Ichimoku cloud + diamond patterns

2H.note: CME futures analysis, cloud twist timing

usage: Cloud twist = timing of potential reversals
Cloud thickness = support/resistance strength
Price entering cloud = dangerous zone (hard to trade)
Cloud as jump pad for uptrend continuation
Monday 5AM (JST) cloud twist = watch for manipulation
ichimoku_cloud.visual_note: Green/red cloud fill visible on TradingView. Red line (Senkou A) and green line (Senkou B) clearly shown

GMMA.settings: Custom 'GMMA改' (modified version). Standard short-term (3,5,8,10,12,15) + long-term (30,35,40,45,50,60) EMA bundles
usage: Short-term bundle vs long-term bundle = trend strength
Bundles intertwined = consolidation/range
Long-term bundle spacing wide = strong trend
Price breaking through long-term GMMA = major move incoming
GMMA + SMA200 combo for 5min scalping
Perfect Order = all MAs aligned = strong trend
GC/DC signals between bundles for entry/exit
GMMA.visual_note: Rainbow-colored bands - red/yellow for short-term, green/blue for long-term on dark TradingView theme

TARS.description: Breakout detection indicator. Shows vertical purple/blue shading when price is consolidating ('煮詰まり'). Does NOT predict direction, only signals volatility compression before breakout
TARS.settings: Custom indicator on TradingView. Sub-pane shows histogram (green) that spikes when breakout conditions are met
usage: Purple vertical bars = consolidation detected
Histogram peaks = breakout imminent
Combined with 3-day chart for macro breakout timing
Used to time entries - wait for TARS signal then direction confirmation
TARS.visual_note: Purple/blue vertical shading zones on main chart, green histogram below. Layout reference: '8_BTC_TARS'

settings.SMA200: Yellow line, used as dynamic support/resistance on 5min for scalping

usage: SMA200 as major S/R on 5min chart
Combined with GMMA for breakout confirmation
Divergence detection (regular and hidden)
Golden Cross (GC) = bullish, Dead Cross (DC) = bearish
Hidden GC = bullish continuation (price higher low + MACD lower low)
Regular divergence = reversal warning
Used on 1H-4H for timing

RMI_Trend_Sniper.description: TradingView indicator. Shows trend direction with colored bands + triangle signals (green up / red down). Appeared in Oct 2023
RMI_Trend_Sniper.visual_note: Red/blue/green colored bands with arrow signals. Layout: '1.BTUSD_coin'

CVD_Volume.description: (D7R) CVD+ and (D7R) Volume+ indicators on TradingLite
CVD_Volume.usage: Large order flow analysis, whale tracking

triangle_wedge.note: Includes symmetric triangles, wedges, and general triangle references

channel.note: Parallel channels (ascending/descending), used for range-bound trading

head_and_shoulders.note: 三尊 (triple mountain). Both regular and inverted

diamond.note: DISTINCTIVE. danjer's specialty pattern. Used on 15min to 8H. Often precedes major reversals

ascending_triangle.note: アセトラ - bullish pattern, frequent in Mar-Jun 2023 as BTC built base

double_top_bottom.note: W-bottom for entry, double top for exit

dragon_pattern.note: ドラゴンチャート - specialty pattern: tail, body, legs, head. Back = resistance, tail tip = price target

inside_outside.note: Inside bars for range compression, outside bars for breakout confirmation. Used on weekly

cup_and_handle.note: Used on monthly ETH chart and daily BTC. Classic pattern

descending_triangle.note: Bearish pattern, less frequent in 2023 uptrend

left_right_translation.description: High point in left half = bearish (LT), right half = bullish (RT). Used to determine trend within cycle

details.bar_counting: Uses TradingView's bar count + percentage range measurement tool

cycle_theory.key_insight: danjer counts bars between cycle lows, looks for 60-80 bar 4H cycles. Left/Right translation determines bias within cycle

usage: Overlaying past price action onto current chart (yellow box = past, current = present)
Sep-Nov 2022 pattern copy-pasted onto Jan 2023
Historical pattern matching for direction prediction
Combined with channel analysis for projection
fractal_analysis.key_insight: danjer physically draws past patterns over current price to find similarities. When match is strong, trades with high conviction

elliott_wave.usage: Mapped to sentiment cycle: pessimism (Wave 1-2), skepticism (Wave 3), optimism (Wave 4-5), euphoria (top)
elliott_wave.note: More conceptual than strict counting. Uses 'market is born in pessimism' quote frequently

dow_theory.usage: Higher highs + higher lows = uptrend, lower highs + lower lows = downtrend. Used for basic trend determination on 8H

log_scale.usage: Weekly BTC analysis on log scale to find long-term trendlines spanning 2015-2024

sources: Coinglass liquidation heatmap (精算ヒートマップ)
usage: Mega liquidation events = potential reversal points
Liquidation clusters below price = magnets pulling price down
After large long liquidation = consider long (shorts are crowded)
3-day heatmap view on Coinglass for identifying major liquidation zones
OI surge = fuel accumulating (direction unknown)
OI drop + price drop = longs closing (healthy correction)
OI rise + price rise = new longs opening (watch for reversal)
OI rise + price drop = shorts opening (potential squeeze target)
Bybit + Binance OI compared side by side
Negative FR = shorts paying longs = potential bottom signal
High positive FR = overleveraged longs = caution
FR displayed as bar chart at bottom of Coinglass charts
Large bid walls = potential support (but can be moved/pulled)
Watching for wall consumption vs wall movement
Price levels with thin order book = fast moves expected
TradingLite for visual heatmap of large orders

derivatives_sheet.data: Price, Basis, BasisChg, Funding, Next FR, Yield, Open Interest, 24h Volume across 20+ venues
derivatives_sheet.usage: CME basis premium monitoring, cross-exchange OI comparison

support_resistance_methods.horizontal_levels: Most frequently used. Yellow/cyan/white horizontal lines at key price points

neckline.note: Critical for H&S patterns and double bottom entries

breakout.note: Often combined with GMMA/TARS for timing

support_resistance_methods.channel_lines: Drawn in cyan/white/yellow on TradingView. Parallel channels very common
support_resistance_methods.monthly_open: 月足始値 (monthly candle open) used as key level

TradingLite.usage: Order flow, large order visualization, CVD, Volume+
TradingLite.note: Paid subscription required for major exchanges

FXGT.usage: Trading execution for high-leverage trades (up to 1000x)
FXGT.accounts: Multiple accounts, MT4/MT5, Standard+ account for bonus

colors.yellow: Primary annotation color - trendlines, projected price paths, cycle counts
colors.cyan: Support/resistance levels, channel lines, key zones
colors.white: Secondary trendlines, projected patterns, Dow theory arrows
colors.pink_magenta: Highlighted zones, key candles, liquidation areas

text_annotations.style: Blue/cyan text boxes with explanations directly on chart
common_labels: ここ超えたら本物 (if breaks here, it's real)
定着出来るか？ (can it hold?)

annotation_style.arrow_annotations: Large silver/white 3D arrows for projected direction

new_in_2023: TARS breakout indicator (first appeared Feb 2023, used through Dec)
RMI Trend Sniper (appeared Oct 2023, seems to be testing new tools)
Modified GMMA ('GMMA改') with GC/DC signals on bundles
Dragon pattern analysis (ドラゴンチャート) - more refined in 2023
Bitcoin Derivatives Sheet (@btc_status) for cross-exchange analysis
More systematic cycle bar-counting with specific 60-80 bar targets
CME gap analysis became more prominent (34 mentions, especially Nov-Dec with BTC rally)
High-leverage challenge content ('1万チャレンジ') became systematic in Mar-May 2023
continued_from_2022: Fractal overlay analysis unchanged in method
Ichimoku cloud as primary trend indicator
reduced_in_2023: Overall posting volume dropped dramatically in H2 (84% decline)
No APS indicator found in 2023 data
evolution_from_2022.key_evolution_narrative: danjer's 2023 analysis shows refinement rather than revolution. The core framework (Cycle + Fractal + Ichimoku + GMMA) remained stable. New tools (TARS, RMI) were tested but not dominant. The biggest change was incorporating more derivatives data (OI/FR/Liquidation increased vs pure chart patterns). Diamond pattern analysis became a signature move. The massive H2 activity drop suggests either real trading focus (less posting) or reduced market interest during BTC's summer consolidation.

BTC_major_levels: $22,200 - Most mentioned level (8 times). Key S/R zone
$27,000 - Major horizontal level (7 times). Cycle theory target
$37,000-38,000 - November rally zone, cloud + fractal analysis
$43,000-45,000 - December targets, CME gap + liquidation zones

trading_style_insights.position_sizing: 1万 (10,000 JPY) challenge accounts with 100-1000x leverage on FXGT. Separate from main trading
trading_style_insights.risk_management: 0-cut (zero-cut = exchange liquidation as stop loss). Extract profits immediately ('出金こそ命')
trading_style_insights.entry_style: Wait for consolidation completion → breakout confirmation → enter. 'Chance will come again'
trading_style_insights.exit_style: Set TP immediately on entry. Take partial profits early. 'Any profit is better than potential profit'
trading_style_insights.multi_timeframe: Analyze Weekly/3D for direction → 8H/4H for cycle positioning → 1H/5min for entry
trading_style_insights.conviction_trading: When fractal match is strong + cycle aligns + GMMA confirms → high conviction (large position)
